attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ACCRUE_ON_RECEIPT_FLAG,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.APPROVED_DATE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.APPROVED_FLAG,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE1,    
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')  ATTRIBUTE11,     
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')  ATTRIBUTE2,     
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')  ATTRIBUTE3,     
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE7,      
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE9,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CANCEL_DATE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CANCEL_FLAG,
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CANCEL_REASON,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') CANCEL_REASON,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CANCELLED_BY,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CLOSED_BY,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CLOSED_CODE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CLOSED_DATE,
Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CLOSED_REASON,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')  CLOSED_REASON,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CREATED_BY,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.MATCH_OPTION,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.NEED_BY_DATE,
 Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.NOTE_TO_RECEIVER,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')  NOTE_TO_RECEIVER, 
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ORG_ID,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.PO_HEADER_ID,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.PO_LINE_ID,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.PRICE_OVERRIDE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.PROMISED_DATE,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.QUANTITY,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_BILLED,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_RECEIVED,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_REJECTED,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.QUANTITY_SHIPPED,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.SHIPMENT_NUM,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.TAXABLE_FLAG,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.TAX_CODE_ID,
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.TERMS_ID,
 Replace(Replace(MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE15
FROM
 MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL WHERE     MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
